title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.301 - Alternative methods of electing directors
text:
355.301.  Alternative methods of electing directors. — A corporation may provide in its articles or bylaws for election of directors by members or delegates on the basis of chapter or other organizational unit, by region or other geographic unit, by preferential voting, or by any other reasonable method.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
